recorded_note: Frozen baseline recorded BEFORE the research engine exists (Phase 0.1). v0.4.0 exposed ten OpenRouter tools with tool_choice:auto; web_search returned ranked links, read_page was a separate call, malformed streamed arguments silently became {}, and the weak-model fallback executed one routed tool and stopped. These outcomes are the honest starting point; later phases must demonstrate improvement against them and must NEVER weaken a corpus assertion because v0.4.0 fails it.

stage_timings_ms.note: v0.4.0 has no staged research pipeline (planning/searching/reading/synthesizing); stage timings begin with Phase 2's ResearchTrace.
